hooks.prompt: Run eslint on the edited file using `pnpm exec eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern <file_path>`. The file path is in $ARGUMENTS under tool_input.file_path or tool_response.filePath. Only lint files ending in .ts, .js, .mjs, .cjs, or .html — skip all others silently. If eslint reports errors, fix them by editing the file. If eslint passes or the file type doesn't match, do nothing.
